summary: Iteration 113 - Testing email capture gate for Quick Viability Search. All tests passed (10 backend, 20+ frontend checks). Email gate flow works correctly: 1 free search → email gate appears → email capture unlocks 3 more → exhausted state after 4 total.
passed_tests: POST /api/leads/capture accepts valid email with source 'quick_viability_gate'
POST /api/leads/capture rejects email without @ symbol
POST /api/leads/capture rejects empty email
POST /api/leads/capture rejects whitespace-only email
POST /api/leads/capture accepts email with different source values
POST /api/leads/capture works without context field
POST /api/leads/capture works without source field (defaults to 'unknown')
POST /api/leads/capture handles duplicate emails via upsert
POST /api/leads/capture normalizes email to lowercase
POST /api/leads/capture handles special characters in context
Quick Viability Search allows 1 free search without email
After first search, email capture gate appears with 'Unlock 3 more free searches' heading
Email gate has email input field
Email gate has 'Unlock' submit button
Email gate has 'No spam' privacy note
Search counter shows progress dots and 'X free searches left' text
Submitting email via gate calls POST /api/leads/capture
After email capture, gate disappears
After email capture, user can make 3 more searches (4 total)
Search counter updates correctly: 2 left → 1 left → exhausted
After all 4 searches exhausted, 'searches exhausted' state shows
Exhausted state shows 'You've used all your free searches' message
Exhausted state shows 'Start Free — Unlimited Searches' signup CTA
Search input is disabled when all searches are exhausted
LocalStorage key ts_viability_searches persists state across reloads
LocalStorage key ts_viability_email persists email across reloads
Viability result card renders with score (X/100 format)
Viability result card renders with verdict badge
Viability result card renders with signal breakdown
Viability result card renders with strengths list
Viability result card renders with risks list
Suggestion chips still work for first search
Clicking suggestion chip fills input (does not auto-submit)
Interactive demo section still renders below
Hero section still works
Trust bar still works
Features highlight section still works
Product showcase section still works
Final CTA section still works
No critical console errors
critical_code_review_comments: QuickViabilitySearch.jsx correctly implements email gate logic with FREE_BEFORE_GATE=1 and FREE_AFTER_GATE=3
LocalStorage keys ts_viability_searches and ts_viability_email properly persist state
Email gate form correctly calls POST /api/leads/capture with source='quick_viability_gate'
Backend leads.py endpoint properly validates email and uses upsert to avoid duplicates
Search counter progress dots correctly show filled/unfilled state based on count
Exhausted state properly disables search input and shows signup CTA
All data-testid attributes present for testing: email-gate, email-gate-input, email-gate-submit, email-gate-success, searches-exhausted, exhausted-signup-cta, search-counter
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 113 verified email capture gate for QuickViabilitySearch. Flow: (1) First search works free → result shows + email gate appears, (2) Enter email → POST /api/leads/capture called + 3 more unlocked, (3) After 4 total searches → exhausted state with signup CTA. LocalStorage keys: ts_viability_searches (JSON with count/gated), ts_viability_email (email string). Backend endpoint at POST /api/leads/capture accepts {email, source, context} and uses upsert. All homepage sections still work.

exhausted_state.message: You've used all your free searches

localStorage_persistence.ts_viability_searches: JSON with count and gated fields

console_errors.details: Minor 403 error (likely external resource) - not affecting functionality
